mapper.select: SELECT c.*, t.name AS teacher_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id ORDER BY c.id
SELECT c.*, t.name AS teacher_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (name, description, teacher_id, hours, fee, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{teacherId}, #{hours}, #{fee}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET name=#{name}, description=#{description}, teacher_id=#{teacherId}, hours=#{hours}, fee=#{fee}, status=#{status} WHERE id = #{id}
